suggestions.rationale: Explicitly deferred from ACDE #239 with expectation to present on next call. Presenter was absent, blocking any discussion or decision.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7928 BAL state access ordering final decision
suggestions.rationale: Soft-committed to Tony's proposal in ACDE #239 with async review of Dragon's alternative due end of week. Needs confirmation for glamsterdam-devnet-6 spec stability.

suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-6 status and next devnet scope
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-6 targeted mid-week of June 23 (last week). Status check needed, plus scoping for devnet-7 given remaining Glamsterdam EIPs (8189, 7610, 8254) and pending repricing values.
Multiple EIPs now PFI'd for Hegota (8188, 8182, 4758, 8131, 8279, 7979, 8173, 7851, 8151, 7645, 8304). Time to discuss which should be headliner(s) and prioritization.
Action item from ACDE #235 and #238 to schedule breakout call once draft merged. Validation algorithm moved on-chain per ACDE #238, but no confirmation call was held.
Proposed for Glamsterdam or Hegota in ACDE #239. Geth, Besu, ethrex progressing. Needs decision on which fork to target.
Deferred from glamsterdam-devnet-4 in ACDE #237 pending BAL Discord decision. No updates since, but may have been resolved async—confirmation needed.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam mainnet timeline and testnets scoping
suggestions.rationale: With devnet-6 scope mostly finalized and only a few EIPs remaining, initial discussion of mainnet timeline and public testnet strategy would be timely.
